evidence.snippet: Exact source line snippet copied from the cited file
evidence.note: source, sink, guard, or impact evidence

proof_obligations.summary: Conclusion for this required check. For needs_context, explain the missing source/config/runtime fact.

evidence.snippet: Exact source line snippet copied from the cited file
evidence.note: why this line closes the obligation

findings.title: <severity> - <type of vuln> - <location>
findings.attacker_role: Required attacker role, auth state, or privilege level
findings.preconditions: Deployment settings, feature flags, data state, or user actions required
findings.summary: Technical summary of the verified root cause.
findings.evidence: Source, sink, missing guard, line references, and proof notes.
findings.attack_chain:
1. Attacker reaches the entrypoint.
2. Attacker controls the vulnerable input.
3. Input reaches the sink without the required guard.
4. Security impact occurs.
findings.example_attack: Concrete controlled-test example of how the attack would look, without unnecessary live-target weaponization.
findings.impact: Short impact statement retained for summary tooling.
findings.impact_analysis: Thorough impact analysis covering confidentiality, integrity, availability, privilege boundaries, data scope, and realistic blast radius.
findings.attacker_use: How an attacker could use this in practice, including what they gain and what limits the attack.
findings.validation_notes: How to reproduce safely and how to verify the fix.
